en: When you get bit by a snake, you're supposed to suck the poison out.
That's what I had to do.
Suck all the poison out of my life.
Who is living proof that the more people are scared of you, the more flowers you get.
ko: 사람들이 너를 두려워할수록 더 많은 꽃을 받는다는 살아있는 증거야.

en: Who is living proof that no good deed goes unpunished.
ko: 선한 행동이 벌을 받는다는 살아있는 증거야.

en: Oh, hi. Did you want to buy some drugs?
I'm just done with my quiz.
Wait, I'll grade it right now.
I gotta say, watching the police search my house really was the cherry on top of a fantastic year.
ko: 경찰이 내 집을 수색하는 걸 보는 건 정말 환상적인 한 해의 정점이었어.

en: How much trouble did you get in for telling the truth?
Well, you didn't write that whole book yourself. Did you tell Mr. Duvall?
ko: 그 책을 혼자 쓴 건 아니잖아. 두발 선생님께 말했어?
